metadata.title: BusinessDNA — Find and build the business that fits you
metadata.description: AI-powered guidance to discover, validate and launch the business that matches your personality, skills and goals.

common.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

sidebar.upgradeDescription: Unlock unlimited blueprints and your AI Co-Founder.

hero.title: Your future business starts with the right plan.
hero.subtitle: Personalized business matches, AI-generated plans and step-by-step guidance — built around who you actually are.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From personality to launch, in four guided steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Tell us about your skills, goals, budget and lifestyle.
howItWorks.step2Desc: See compatibility scores across dozens of real business models.
howItWorks.step3Desc: A full business plan, financial model and brand direction — generated for you.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Work through a month-by-month plan with your AI Co-Founder.

features.title: Everything you need to go from idea to launch
features.item1Desc: Matches are based on how you actually work, not generic trends.
features.item2Desc: Executive summary, market analysis, SWOT and financial forecast.
features.item3Desc: A daily thinking partner for decisions, not just documents.
features.item4Desc: Month-by-month milestones so you always know the next step.

journey.title: Your journey
journey.subtitle: One guided path from uncertainty to launch day.

testimonials.title: Built for people building something real

t1.quote: The blueprint gave me a real starting point instead of a blank page.
t1.name: Andrei P.

t2.quote: I finally had a plan that matched how I actually want to work.
t2.name: Maria I.

t3.quote: The roadmap kept me moving instead of stuck in research mode.
t3.name: Radu V.

pricing.title: Simple, honest pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready to launch.
pricing.proDesc: Full blueprints, roadmaps and your AI Co-Founder.

q1.question: Do I need a business idea to start?
q1.answer: No — most people start with the assessment and let BusinessDNA suggest matches based on their profile.

q2.question: What languages are supported?
q2.answer: The app and every generated document are available in English and Romanian, with more languages planned.

q3.question: Can I cancel anytime?
q3.answer: Yes, subscriptions are month-to-month with no long-term commitment.

q4.question: Is my data kept private?
q4.answer: Your assessment answers and business data are never shared or sold to third parties.

cta.title: Find the business that fits you.
cta.subtitle: It takes about ten minutes to get your first matches.

footer.tagline: The business that fits you, built step by step.

intro.title: Let's get to know you.
intro.subtitle: Eight short sections, one question at a time. Answer honestly — there are no wrong answers, only better matches.

validation.required: This one needs an answer before you continue.

review.title: Let's review your answers.
review.subtitle: Everything here is editable — tap any section to change your answer.

results.title: We're building your entrepreneurial profile.
results.subtitle: Your matches will appear here once they're ready — this usually takes about a minute.
results.cardSubtitlePlaceholder: This card will show a business match once analysis is complete.

thinking.subtext: This usually takes about twenty seconds.

aboutYou.title: About you
aboutYou.description: The basics — so we can ground everything else in your real situation.

financialSituation.title: Financial situation
financialSituation.description: What you have to invest, and what you need to earn.

personality.title: Personality
personality.description: How you think, decide and work best.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Rate your comfort across ten common founder skills.

lifestyle.title: Lifestyle
lifestyle.description: The shape of the working life you actually want.

risk.title: Risk
risk.description: How much uncertainty you can comfortably carry.

interests.title: Interests
interests.description: What draws you in — and what you'd rather avoid.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: Where this is all headed, in your own words.

country.label: Which country are you based in?

weeklyAvailability.label: How many hours a week could you realistically give this?

incomeUrgency.label: How urgently do you need this to replace your income?

options.low: Not urgent — I can be patient
options.moderate: Somewhat — I'd like traction within a year
options.high: Fairly urgent — within a few months

budget.label: How much could you invest to get started?

targetMonthlyIncome.label: What monthly income would make this feel worth it?

desiredTimeline.label: How soon would you like to see real traction?

decisionMaking.label: How do you usually make important decisions?

options.collaborative: I talk it through with others
options.decisive: I decide fast and adjust later

sellingPreference.label: How comfortable are you selling to people directly?

leadership.label: How comfortable are you leading and directing others?

problemSolving.label: How much do you enjoy solving messy, undefined problems?

creativity.label: How creative would you say you are?

structureVsFlexibility.label: Where do you sit between structure and flexibility?
structureVsFlexibility.description: 0 means you crave structure and routine, 100 means you thrive on flexibility and change.

remote.label: Where would you like to work from?

travel.label: How much travel would you be comfortable with?

employees.label: Do you want to manage a team?

options.soloOnly: Just me, at least at first

freedom.label: How much day-to-day freedom do you need?

workingHours.label: How many hours a week do you want to work, long-term?

b2bVsB2c.label: Who would you rather sell to?

riskTolerance.label: How much financial risk are you willing to take on?

failureTolerance.label: How would a failed first attempt affect you?
failureTolerance.description: 1 means it would be very discouraging, 5 means you'd see it as part of the process.

investmentConfidence.label: How confident are you investing your own money into this?

businessModels.label: Which of these business models appeal to you?

topics.label: Anything else you're drawn to that we haven't covered?

neverDo.label: Is there anything you'd never want your day-to-day work to involve?

fiveYearVision.label: Where do you want this to have taken you in five years?

definitionOfSuccess.label: What would make this feel like a success to you, personally?
